metadata.dc:title: Henry's Tennis Knowledge Vault
metadata.dc:creator: Henry Pham Duc
metadata.dc:rights: Personal coaching notes © 2026 Henry Pham Duc
metadata.dc:description: A bilingual (EN-VI) tennis coaching library for the 3.5 player at 50+. Covers 22 deep dives across footwork, forehand, backhand, serve, volley, return, slice, lob/overhead, doubles, mental game, grip pressure, and the Complete Manual v2 (14 Parts, 2-page cheat sheet).
